leadText: The Absolite (Japanese: アブソルナイト Absolnite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Absol to Mega Evolve into Mega Absol.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by an Absol , the Absolite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Absol if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove an Absolite from Absol. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by an Absol, the Absolite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Absol when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Absol will remain a Mega Absol until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by an Absol , the Absolite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Absol if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove an Absolite from Absol.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Absol hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Absol hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. An Absol holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Kiloude City (from Calem / Serena after defeating them) OR AS Safari Zone (requires Acro Bike ) S M US UM Battle Tree (64 BP ) ZA Jaune Sector 6 (after defeating the Rogue Mega Absol during Main Mission 09: "Chase That Mysterious Pokémon!" )
